commentary_links.hebrew: לֹא־תָבִיא֩ אֶתְנַ֨ן זוֹנָ֜ה וּמְחִ֣יר כֶּ֗לֶב בֵּ֛ית יְהֹוָ֥ה אֱלֹהֶ֖יךָ לְכׇל־נֶ֑דֶר כִּ֧י תוֹעֲבַ֛ת יְהֹוָ֥ה אֱלֹהֶ֖יךָ גַּם־שְׁנֵיהֶֽם׃ {ס}
commentary_links.english: You shall not bring the fee of a whore or the pay of a dogjpay of a dog Perhaps the earnings of a male prostitute. Or “price of a dog.” Force of Heb. uncertain. into the house of the ETERNAL your God in fulfillment of any vow, for both are abhorrent to the ETERNAL your God.
commentary_links.matched_snippet: אתנן זונה ומחיר כלב שמע מינה

commentary_links.hebrew: אִם־בְּגַפּ֥וֹ יָבֹ֖א בְּגַפּ֣וֹ יֵצֵ֑א אִם־בַּ֤עַל אִשָּׁה֙ ה֔וּא וְיָצְאָ֥ה אִשְׁתּ֖וֹ עִמּֽוֹ׃
commentary_links.english: If he came single, he shall leave single; if he had a wife, his wife shall leave with him.
commentary_links.matched_snippet: הכא במאי עסקינן כגון דלית ליה אשה ובנים

commentary_links.english:
You sell Your people for no fortune,
You set no high price on them.
commentary_links.matched_snippet: תמכר עמך בלא הון ולא רבית במחיריהם
